nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: Well, we probably won't ask what kind of DNA experiments these are.

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: What happened to the clones that were already created?

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: By that time I had already woken up.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Your story is certainly not bad.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: But after the phone call part it completely stopped being scary.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Let me take the initiative and tell my story.

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: The maestro of scary stories is in action!

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: I'll bet 10 bucks that this will be a ghost story.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Well then, get your wallet ready, because there definitely won't be any ghosts in my story!
